meta.title: Practitioner payouts - Admin
meta.description: Review practitioner balances, package money, and manual payout records.

meta.title: Practitioner payouts - Admin
meta.description: Review each practitioner by currency and record the amount actually transferred outside the platform.

list.title: Practitioner payouts
list.description: Review each practitioner by currency and record the amount actually transferred outside the platform.
list.emptyDescription: There are no practitioners with payable or package balances at the moment.
list.note: Session balances and package balances are shown on the same page while keeping EGP and USD separate.

workspace.title: Create a settlement after the money leaves Fayed
workspace.description: Pick the practitioner, confirm the payout destination snapshot, then record the exact amount you transferred outside the platform.

bullets.keepHistory: Keep the payout history in one place

meta.title: Practitioner payout details
meta.description: View currency balances, package amounts, and payout history for one practitioner.

detail.description: See currency-specific balances, package amounts, and payout history for one practitioner.
detail.packageSectionDescription: Package money belongs to the practitioner account, but the held part stays outside the payable total until it is released.
detail.packageSectionNote: Held package amounts are shown for clarity only and cannot be paid now unless the backend release rules already allow it.
detail.historyDescription: Recent manual payouts recorded for this practitioner.
detail.historyEmptyDescription: Recorded payouts will appear here once they are saved.

filters.practitionerPlaceholder: Search by practitioner name or ID

meta.title: Payout history - Admin
meta.description: Review manual payouts recorded across practitioners.

history.title: Payout history
history.description: Review payout records recorded by admins.

detail.title: Payout details
detail.description: Review the payout record exactly as it was saved by the admin.
detail.noNotes: No notes were added for this payout.

drawer.searchDescription: Search by practitioner name or code to choose the practitioner you want to record a settlement for.
drawer.title: Record practitioner payout
drawer.description: Choose the currency and record the amount actually transferred outside the platform.
drawer.manualNotice: This only records the payout. The transfer happens outside the platform.
drawer.searchHint: Search returns up to 30 lightweight results only.
drawer.searchStartDescription: Search by practitioner name or code to choose the practitioner you want to record a settlement for.
drawer.searchPlaceholder: Search by practitioner name or code
drawer.selectionNote: Review the balance cards and the read-only payout destination snapshot, then record the actual amount you transferred outside Fayed.
drawer.identityConfirmation: Confirm the practitioner details before recording the settlement.
drawer.currencyHelp: Each currency has a separate balance and is recorded independently.
drawer.packageHeldNote: Held package amounts are shown for review only and are not part of the payable total.
drawer.noPayableAmount: There is no payable amount for this practitioner in the selected currency.
drawer.footerNote: Record the amount that was actually transferred outside the platform.
drawer.destinationMissing: No payout destination snapshot is available for this practitioner.
drawer.confirmationHint: Confirm that the amount above matches what was actually transferred externally before saving.

validation.amountInvalid: Enter a valid amount greater than zero.
validation.amountTooHigh: You cannot record more than the payable amount for this currency.

drawer.searchError: Could not load search results right now.
drawer.initialEmptyMessage: No practitioners have settlement-eligible balances right now.
drawer.confirmationCheckboxLabel: I confirm the amount above is the amount actually transferred outside the platform.

errors.balanceUnavailable: Could not load the balance right now.
errors.amountInvalid: Enter a valid amount greater than zero.
errors.amountExceedsDue: You cannot record more than the payable balance for this currency.
errors.noPayableAmount: There is no payable balance for this practitioner in the selected currency.
errors.generic: Could not record the payout right now.
errors.duplicateReference: This transfer reference was already recorded.

messages.error: Could not save the settlement right now. Please try again.
